# Specialized Inference Systems: SambaNova, Cerebras, Groq

Specialized systems change the architecture conversation. They are not just
faster GPUs; they often expose a different execution model.

## Chapter Job

Compare specialized inference architectures by workload fit, software contract,
scaling model, and operational tradeoff.

## Systems to Cover

- SambaNova-style dataflow architecture.
- Cerebras-style wafer-scale architecture.
- Groq-style deterministic token pipeline and LPU framing.

## Comparison Axes

- Programming model.
- Compiler path.
- Memory model.
- Network or scale-out model.
- Latency profile.
- Throughput profile.
- Model compatibility.
- Serving interface.
- Deployment model.
- Operational maturity.

## Rule

This chapter must separate vendor claims from measured behavior. Each system
gets a source-verified architecture summary and a workload-fit analysis.
